message:
test(core): property-based tests for SessionRestoreConfig + LogConfig (12 tests)

Closes the last two non-feature-gated serde coverage gaps. Tests
serde roundtrips, deterministic serialization, empty-JSON-to-default,
partial deserialization with default fill, and Default()/serde(default)
consistency for both #[serde(default)] config structs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
